zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd於1245年出生在英國史洛普爾盧德洛福時，她的父親Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog50歲，母親Emma de Audley25歲。她於1261年10月2日與Sir William le Boteler在英國史洛普爾維姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1308年6月22日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維姆享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd于1245年出生在英国史洛普爾盧德洛福时，她的父亲Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog50岁，母亲Emma de Audley25岁。她于1261年10月2日与Sir William le Boteler在英国史洛普爾維姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1308年6月22日在英国英格兰史洛普爾維姆享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd was born in 1245, in Ludlow, Shropshire, England, her father, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, was 50 and her mother, Emma de Audley, was 25. She married Sir William le Boteler on 2 October 1261, in Wem, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 June 1308, in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd est née en 1245, à Ludlow, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Emma de Audley, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William le Boteler le 2 octobre 1261, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juin 1308, à Wem, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd 1245 in Ludlow, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog 50 und ihre Mutter Emma de Audley 25. Sie hat am 2. Oktober 1261 in Wem, Shropshire, England Sir William le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juni 1308 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Wem, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd è nata il nel 1245 nel Ludlow, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Emma de Audley, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir William le Boteler il 2 ottobre 1261, nel Wem, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 giugno 1308, nel Wem, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Angharad Verch Gruffuddが1245年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルドロウで生まれた時，父Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madogは50歳，母Emma de Audleyは25歳であった。1261年10月2日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムでSir William le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1308年6月22日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd(이)가 1245년 영국 슈럽실르 루들로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Audley(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1261년 10월 2일 영국 슈럽실르 베에서 Sir William le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1308년 6월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 베에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd nasceu em 1245, em Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Audley, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William le Boteler em 2 de outubro de 1261, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de junho de 1308, em Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd родилась в 1245 г. в местности лудлоу, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Audley, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William le Boteler 2 октября 1261 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 июня 1308 г. в местности вем, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Angharad Verch Gruffudd nació en 1245, en Ludlow, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gruffydd Maelor II ap Madog, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Emma de Audley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir William le Boteler el 2 de octubre de 1261, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de junio de 1308, en Wem, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
